homeSection.title: Major Updates
homeSection.intro: Key milestones, announcements, and major WSUA developments.

pageSection.title: Latest Updates
pageSection.intro: This page highlights major WSUA announcements and important milestones.

posts.title: WSUA Coffee Collection Integrated
posts.body: Our coffee page now links directly to each Charity Roasters product so supporters can go from story to checkout in one click.

posts.title: Program Pages Expanded
posts.body: Core program pages have been refreshed to better explain humanitarian aid, legal research, and energy independence initiatives.

posts.title: Legal Resource Access Improved
posts.body: Research, claims guidance, and document library navigation has been streamlined to make information easier to find.
